block-template-entities.description: Angular v17 introduces a new control flow syntax that uses the @ and } characters. This migration replaces the existing usages with their corresponding HTML entities.

migration-v17-compiler-options.description: CompilerOption.useJit and CompilerOption.missingTranslation are unused under Ivy. This migration removes their usage

invalid-two-way-bindings.description: Updates two-way bindings that have an invalid expression to use the longform expression instead.

migration-v16-remove-module-id.description: As of Angular v16, the `moduleId` property of `@Component` is deprecated as it no longer has any effect.

migration-v16-guard-and-resolve-interfac.description: In Angular version 15.2, the guard and resolver interfaces (CanActivate, Resolve, etc) were deprecated. This migration removes imports and 'implements' clauses that contain them.
